basics.name: Arafat Khan
basics.summary: Founding engineer at Cline, the open-source AI coding agent used by 4M+ developers, and an AI Engineer World's Fair speaker. I build production AI systems end to end — from agent harnesses and evals to the infrastructure that scales them.

work.name: Cline
highlights: Founding engineer on Cline, the open-source AI coding agent used by 4M+ developers.
Spoke at the AI Engineer World's Fair on 'Evals Are Broken, Use Them Anyway' -> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QuuIywMG4s8

work.name: Sourcegraph
highlights: Built an enterprise AI coding assistant

work.name: ImmigrantFirst
highlights: Built a state of the Art LLM framework to build O-1 visa applications for US immigration using Generative AI -> https://immigrantfirst.ai/

work.name: Shopify
highlights: Co-Implemented a load balancer level splitting of read and write requests using Kubernetes for Shopify’s financial transaction application which improved the p99 request times across most of Shopify’s payment transactions by 50%.
Enhanced networking/infra pipeline to make our payments infrastructure fully compliant with PCI/DSS regulations to pass the audit.
Built, maintained and upgraded highly scalable, fault tolerant Mysql database for critical credit card data

work.name: Shopify
highlights: Built a major tech design for a technical pipeline touching multiple rails services to find major bottlenecks in Shopify’s fraud assessment flow and to improve the checkout latency by 60%.
Managed autoscaling for Black Friday sales as the traffic spiked 10x the normal limit

work.name: Simon Fraser University
highlights: Applied ML techniques on CT Scans of Body segments for FAT analysis and body composition labelling for cancer patients

awards.title: Google Summer of Code
awards.summary: Built the best plotting library for Ruby to support visualizations for science experimentation in Ruby -> https://github.com/SciRuby/rubyplot

awards.title: Ruby Grant
awards.summary: Official Grant from Ruby Association to build Tensorflow in Ruby -> https://github.com/somaticio/tensorflow.rb
